message:
fix: nil client pointers after MCP bridge stop (#9387)

Stop() now sets opsClient, deployClient, and gadgetClient to nil
after stopping each one, preventing callers from invoking methods
on terminated client objects after a Stop+restart failure cycle.

The redundant nil-out in Start()'s rollback path is removed since
Stop() now handles it.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
